title: Dice Rogues
description:
Welcome to DICE ROGUES, the high-stakes, infinitely progressing roguelike where survival depends on the physics of a roll. In this neon-soaked battle against the House, simple numbers are never enough. You must build a hand of sentient dice, each possessing unique personalities and game-breaking "Rogue" effects.

Each round, the house rolls a score to beat, this score increases but you can use the store to upgrade your starting dices or buy new, more powerful ones.

The loop is simple but addictive: Roll to beat the House's escalating goal, earn credits, and visit the shop to forge your path. Transform standard numeric faces into "Sum" or "Product" powers, or gamble on "Pandora’s Box" for massive rewards—if you can stomach the risks. With over 100 unique upgrades, the synergy possibilities are limitless. Will you become a "Minimalist" with two god-tier dice, or a "Hoarder" with a massive, chaotic hand?

Journey through twenty levels of difficulty, named after the iconic neighborhoods of Paris. From the gentle start in Belleville to the final descent into Les Catacombes, the House plays dirtier as you get stronger, adding its own specialized dice and multipliers. Use the "Creator" system to design your own custom dice from scratch, and share your most successful strategies via seeded runs. 

Can you outmaneuver the odds, or will the House always win? The dice are in your hands.
description_short: Dice Rogues is a tactical roguelite with infinite possibilities where you upgrade your dice and harness unpredictable rogue faces (X2, baguette, croissant, etc.) to bend fate, outplay the House, and survive a new roll each run.
